query:
UPDATE keys k SET status = 'orphaned'
            FROM host_chain_blocks_valid b
            WHERE k.chain_id = $1
              AND k.status = 'pending'
              AND b.chain_id = k.chain_id
              AND b.block_hash = k.block_hash
              AND b.block_number = $2
              AND b.block_status = 'orphaned'
